array.string: lock_dir="${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/ceo-agent-service-reply-producer.lock"; if ! mkdir "$lock_dir" 2>/dev/null; then if [ -f "$lock_dir/pid" ] && kill -0 "$(cat "$lock_dir/pid")" 2>/dev/null; then date -u "+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ producer skipped: previous run still active"; exit 0; fi; rm -rf "$lock_dir"; mkdir "$lock_dir"; fi; printf "%s\n" "$$" > "$lock_dir/pid"; trap 'rm -rf "$lock_dir"' EXIT; cd /Users/derek/Documents/Projects/ceo-agent-service/apps/local-service && export PATH=/Users/derek/.local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:$PATH PYTHONPATH=. CEO_NOT_SEND_MESSAGE=0 CEO_LIVE_SEND_BLOCKERS_ACCEPTED=1 CEO_WORKER_DB=/Users/derek/Documents/Projects/ceo-agent-service/data/auto-reply.sqlite3 CEO_WORKSPACE=/Users/derek/Documents/memory CEO_CORPUS_DIR=/Users/derek/Documents/Projects/ceo-agent-service/corpus && date -u "+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ producer starting" && .venv/bin/python -m ceo_agent_service.cli produce-once --db /Users/derek/Documents/Projects/ceo-agent-service/data/auto-reply.sqlite3 --workspace /Users/derek/Documents/memory --corpus-dir /Users/derek/Documents/Projects/ceo-agent-service/corpus; exit_code=$?; date -u "+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ producer finished status=${exit_code}"; exit $exit_code
